notes_for_human_reviewer: MISCATEGORIZATION FAILURE MODE. The submitter dumped 15 items, all labeled 'Risk' — no Assumptions, Issues, or Dependencies sections at all. 'Lead engineer on leave' is an Issue/Dependency, 'scope creep happened' is an Issue (already materialised), 'documentation incomplete' is an Issue. Tests whether the grader penalises completeness for missing R/A/I/D structure (it should — the rubric explicitly asks for the four-category breakdown). Risk_differentiation should floor because there's no differentiation between R/A/I/D. Common drift: scoring completeness 3-4 because the count is high. Tolerance kept at 1 because the structural failure is unambiguous.
